LanguageData:
toggle turret Toggle turret being able to fire at will.\n\nWhen disabled, the turret will not automatically fire unless a target is manually designated.
position promotion Select the colonist who will promote to new position.
This drone has enough power to operate for {0} more. Drag the slider to set the recharge threshold. The drone will attempt to recharge when its energy falls below the threshold. The current recharge threshold is {1}.\n\nWhen the energy is depleted, the drone will enter dormant state. Enable auto-repair. Colonists responsible for Smithing will repair the drone when it gets damaged.sleep Switch the drone's work mode.
Load transport group of {0} Defines the selected transporter(s) as a transport group. Opens the loading dialog so you can decide who and what should be loaded inside.
Load Opens the loading dialog so you can decide who and what should be loaded inside.
Select transport group Select all transporters in this transport group.
Select next in transport group Select next transporter in this transport group.
Select previous in transport group Select previous transporter in this transport group.
Pick up item Pick up the target item and put into this creature's transporter.
Take Off Consumes {0}x {1} to take off. Land Land at the designated location. Pilot required. Fuel required.
